title: BAMS Jobs 2026 – Medical Officer / Community Health Officer
shortInfo: State AYUSH Mission Tripura (SAM Tripura) has released an official recruitment notification for 14 Medical Officer (Homoeopathy/Ayurveda) and Community Health Officer (Ayush) posts on a contractual basis. offers a great opportunity for BHMS and BAMS qualified candidates seeking government healthcare jobs in Tripura. Eligible candidates can apply through email mode on or before 02 June 2026.

basic_details.job_title: SAM Tripura Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 14 Medical Officer / Community Health Officer Posts
basic_details.short_information: State AYUSH Mission Tripura (SAM Tripura) has released an official recruitment notification for 14 Medical Officer (Homoeopathy/Ayurveda) and Community Health Officer (Ayush) posts on a contractual basis. offers a great opportunity for BHMS and BAMS qualified candidates seeking government healthcare jobs in Tripura. Eligible candidates can apply through email mode on or before 02 June 2026.

age_limit.details: Candidates should download and read the SAM Tripura Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below.

qualification.details: Medical Officer (Homoeopathy): BHMS from an Institution recognized under HCC Act. 1973/ Central Council of Homoeopathy including compulsory internship of 1 (one) year duration after passing the final degree examination. The candidate must have a valid Registration of the Central or a State Council. Desirable: Knowledge of Bengali/ Kokborok. Medical Officer (Ayurveda): BAMS or its equivalent Degree from a recognized Ayurvedic Medical Institution and completion of 1 (one) year compulsory internship training after passing of B.A.M.S or its equivalent. The candidate must have a valid Registration of the Central or a State Council. Desirable: Knowledge of Bengali/ Kokborok. Community Health Officer, Ayush: Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine & Surgery (BAMS) from an Ayurvedic Medical Institution recognized by the Central Council of Indian Medicine (CCIM)/NCISM OR Bachelor of Homoeopathic Medicine & Surgery (BHMS) from a Homoeopathic Medical Institution recognized by the Central Council of Homoeopathy (CCH)/ NCH.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 02-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for the SAM Tripura Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the SAM Tripura Recruitment 2026 is June 2, 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this deadline.

faq.question: How many vacancies are available for Medical Officer / Community Health Officer posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 14 vacancies announced for the Medical Officer / Community Health Officer positions under the State AYUSH Mission Tripura Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: What is the educational qualification required for these posts?
faq.answer: Candidates need to possess a BHMS or BAMS degree from a recognized institution, along with a compulsory internship and valid registration. Specific details vary slightly per post.

faq.question: What is the age limit for applicants?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all posts is 40 years as of December 31, 2025. Age relaxation is applicable for SC/ST/PH candidates.

faq.question: What is the salary offered for the Medical Officer posts?
faq.answer: Medical Officers (Homoeopathy and Ayurveda) will receive a salary of Rs. 35,000 per month. Community Health Officers will get Rs. 25,000 plus performance incentives.

faq.question: Is there an application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive by State AYUSH Mission Tripura.

faq.question: How will candidates be selected for the advertised posts?
faq.answer: The selection process involves an Academic Performance Index (API) of 50 marks and a Viva-voce/Personality Test of 50 marks, followed by merit list preparation and document verification.

faq.question: What is the application mode for SAM Tripura Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Applications for this recruitment must be submitted via email. Candidates are advised to carefully follow the instructions provided in the official notification.

faq.question: Are there any desirable qualifications mentioned for the Medical Officer posts?
faq.answer: Yes, for Medical Officer (Homoeopathy) and Medical Officer (Ayurveda) posts, knowledge of Bengali/Kokborok is considered a desirable qualification.

faq.question: Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF link is provided in the "Important Links" section of this article. It is highly recommended to download and read it thoroughly before applying.

seo_tags: State AYUSH Mission Tripura Medical Officer (Homoeopathy)
